articles.title: Hegseth's remarks highlight the government's reluctance to show human costs of war - PBS
articles.description: Remarks by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth that the American press emphasizes U.S. casualties in the Iran war because it “wants to make the president look bad” are a reminder of something that has endured across many decades and conflicts: the tension and trep…
